title: Xtra Dense Mexican Sausages Carnitas
description: A fatty and dense Mexican dish featuring sausages, perfect for midnight cravings, this recipe is gluten-free friendly and served in a carnitas style.

ingredients.name: Mexican sausage
ingredients.notes: preferably with a high fat content

instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the lard or oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the Mexican sausage to the pot, browning it on all sides.
Add the orange and lime juice, and sprinkle with dried oregano.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the sausage mixture for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender and easily shreds with a fork.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Shred the sausage mixture with two forks and serve it in a carnitas style, using the papillote paper or foil to make individual servings.
